name: google_trends_scraper
title: Google Trends Scraper
description: Fetch Google Trends Daily Search Trends RSS for a country and return normalized trending queries, approximate traffic, images, timestamps, and related news items.

seo.title: Google Trends Scraper Tool for Daily Search Trends
seo.description: Fetch Google Trends Daily Search Trends RSS with Better Fetch and return trending queries, approximate traffic, images, timestamps, and related news items.
seo.intro: Google Trends Scraper gives agents a lightweight way to inspect what people are searching for right now. Choose a country and the tool reads the public Google Trends RSS feed, returning normalized trend records with approximate traffic, publication time, thumbnail/source metadata, and related news items.

useCases.title: Trend monitoring
useCases.description: Track daily search trends in a country and return structured query, traffic, image, timestamp, and news context fields.

useCases.title: Content planning
useCases.description: Find current topics and related news sources that can seed editorial calendars, briefs, or social listening workflows.

useCases.title: Agent briefings
useCases.description: Give an agent a compact country-level trend feed before it decides which Google News or article extraction tools to run next.

faqs.question: Does Google Trends Scraper return historical interest-over-time data?
faqs.answer: No. Version 0.1 focuses on Daily Search Trends RSS. Historical timelines, regional interest, related queries, and related topics should be added as separately validated slices.

faqs.question: Does it require a Google API key?
faqs.answer: No. The tool reads Google's public Trends RSS feed through Better Fetch and does not use account-specific Google credentials.

faqs.question: Which countries are supported?
faqs.answer: The input accepts two-letter country codes such as US, AU, GB, CA, IN, and DE. Results depend on what Google Trends publishes for that country.

country.description: Two-letter Google Trends country code, such as US, AU, GB, CA, IN, or DE.

trends.description: Google Trends Daily Search Trends records

news_count.description: Number of related news items found for this trend

news_items.description: Related news items from the Trends feed, keyed by trend query

query.description: Trend query this news item belongs to
